name: california-contra-costa
description: Contra Costa County civic data from official county government websites

config.description: Contra Costa County civic data from official county government websites

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract scheduled and past Contra Costa County Board of Supervisors meetings — meeting date, time, location, agenda PDF link, and minutes link when available. Each item should yield one Meeting record with externalId (date + body slug), title, body ('Contra Costa County Board of Supervisors'), scheduledAt (combined date + time), location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl.
hints: Contra Costa County Board of Supervisors publishes meeting agendas at this URL
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, body, scheduledAt, location, agendaUrl, minutesUrl
Past meetings and upcoming meetings may live on the same page or on tabbed/paginated sections — capture both when present

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract Contra Costa County Board of Supervisors members — name, district number, party affiliation if listed, photo URL, contact info (phone, email, district office address), and profile page link. Construct externalId as 'california-contra-costa-supervisor-{district}' using the district number.
hints: externalId: construct as 'california-contra-costa-supervisor-{district}' using the district number
The page uses a CivicPlus template structure with content wrapped in 'pageContent cpGrid' containers.
Representative data is likely contained within a specific widget or section with a unique ID like 'divToolbars' or a dedicated 'boardMembers' container.
Member names and photos are typically found in 'widgetBody' or 'widgetContent' divs with specific class prefixes like 'cp-PopOver' or 'widgetGraphicLinks'.
The HTML provided is truncated and lacks the main content section where the list of representatives would be rendered.

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract current and past ballot measures for Contra Costa County — measure identifier (letter/number), full title, election date, sponsoring jurisdiction, measure type (bond, tax, initiative, ordinance, charter amendment, etc.), summary description, and official outcome (passed/failed) where available.
hints: Contra Costa County Registrar of Voters publishes ballot measures at this URL

Extract current and past ballot measures — measure letter/number, title, election date, jurisdiction (county, city, district), measure type (bond, tax, initiative, etc.), short description, and outcome when available
Use these EXACT field names: externalId, title, electionDate, jurisdiction, measureType, description, outcome

dataSources.contentGoal: Extract campaign finance disclosure filings for Contra Costa County — committee name, filer type (candidate/measure committee), election, total contributions received, total expenditures made, and top contributors with amounts.
hints: Contra Costa County campaign finance disclosure portal
Extract campaign finance filings — committee name, candidate or measure supported/opposed, filing date, total contributions, total expenditures, top contributors (name, amount), and reporting period
Use these EXACT field names: committeeId, committeeName, candidateOrMeasure, filingDate, totalContributions, totalExpenditures, reportingPeriod
